person.name: Philippa Standon
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Philippa de Standon was born circa 1220 at Standon, Staffordshire, England.
Philippa was the daughter of Vivian de Sandon or Standon and his wife, Roese de Standon.[1]
Philippa was married twice:
First husband: Sir Thomas Dutton of Dutton,[2] died early in the reign of Edward I (circa 1272), son of Hugh Dutton and his wife, Muriel the daughter of Thomas le Dispenser, and heir to his childless brother, Hugh Dutton of Dutton, with whom Philippa had children:[1]
Hugh Dutton, son and heir;
Thomas Dutton to whom his father gave Great Rownall and Little Rownall in Staffordshire by the consent of Philippa his wife;
Sir Robert Dutton, who married Agnes, the daughter of William de Mere, and Philippa, in her widowhood, granted the manors of Great Rownall and Little Rownall in Staffordshire to the couple;
Margaret, who was married to William Venables, son and heir of Roger Venables of Kinderton in 38 Henry III, 1253;
Katherine, who was married to John, son of Vrian de Sancto Petro;
Second husband: John de Cokefeud to whom Philippa was married by 4 August 1274
[wikitree]

Philippa Standon
Born 1220 in Standon, Staffordshire, England
Daughter of Vivian de Standon and Roese Standon
Wife of Thomas de Dutton — married 1250 in Standon,Staffordshire,England
Mother of Margaret (Dutton) de Venables, Hugh de Dutton, Thomas de Dutton, Robert de Dutton and Katherine (Dutton) de St Pierre
Died after 1294 in Dutton, Cheshire, England

2nd husband : John de Cokefeud to whom Philippa was married by 4 August 1274

[wikitree]

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Standon於1220年出生在英國斯塔福爾斯坦登時，她的父親Vivian De Standon19歲，母親Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon18歲。她於1274年8月4日之前與John de Cokefeud結婚。她去世於1294年之後在英國英格蘭爾達頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Standon于1220年出生在英国斯塔福爾斯坦登时，她的父亲Vivian De Standon19岁，母亲Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon18岁。她于1274年8月4日之前与John de Cokefeud结婚。她去世于1294年之后在英国英格兰爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: Standon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Standen
meanings: English: habitational name predominantly from Standen in Pendleton (Lancashire) and Standean in Ditchling (Sussex), but also from other places similarly named, including Standen in East Grinstead (Sussex), Standen in Biddenden (Kent), Standen in Benenden (Kent), Upper and Lower Standen in Hawkinge (Kent), Standen (Berkshire, Wiltshire, Isle of Wight), and Standon (Devon, Hampshire, Hertfordshire, Staffordshire). The Lancashire, Hampshire, and Wiltshire placenames, as well as Standean in Ditchling (Sussex), derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + denu ‘valley’; Standen in East Grinstead (Sussex) derives from Old English stān + denu or denn ‘pasture’; Standen in Benenden and Standen in Biddenden (Kent) derive from Old English stānig ‘stony, rocky’ + denn; Standen in Hawkinge (Kent) derives from Old English stān + denn; the Berkshire, Devon, Hertfordshire, Isle of Wight, and Staffordshire placenames derive from Old English stān + dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Standon was born in 1220, in Standon, Staffordshire, England, her father, Vivian De Standon, was 19 and her mother, Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon, was 18. She married John de Cokefeud before 4 August 1274. She died after 1294, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Standon est née en 1220, à Standon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Vivian De Standon, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John de Cokefeud avant 4 août 1274. Elle est décédée après 1294, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Standon 1220 in Standon, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Vivian De Standon 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon 18. Sie hat vor 4. August 1274 John de Cokefeud geheiratet. Sie starb nach 1294 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Standon è nata il nel 1220 nel Standon, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Vivian De Standon, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato John de Cokefeud prima del 4 agosto 1274. Morì dopo il 1294, nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Standonが1220年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタンドンで生まれた時，父Vivian De Standonは19歳，母Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standonは18歳であった。1274年8月4日以前にJohn de Cokefeudと結婚した。彼女は1294年以後にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Standon(이)가 1220년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스탠던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Vivian De Standon(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1274년 8월 4일 이전 John de Cokefeud(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1294년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Standon nasceu em 1220, em Standon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Vivian De Standon, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Cokefeud antes 4 de agosto de 1274. Ela faleceu após 1294, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Standon родилась в 1220 г. в местности стандон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Vivian De Standon было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Cokefeud перед 4 августа 1274 г. Она умерла после 1294 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Standon nació en 1220, en Standon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Vivian De Standon, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Rohese de Stafford - Lady Standon, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John de Cokefeud antes de 4 de agosto de 1274. Murió después de 1294, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
